titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien 143
Ḫāylu-Compilation

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: ለዛቲ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ታሪክ፡ አስተጋብአ፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡ እምነ፡ ብዙኃን፡ አህጉር፡ ወደሰያት፡ ከመ፡ ኢይጥፋዕ፡ ዝክረ፡ አበዊሁ፡ ነገሥት፡ ወመኳንንት፡ እምአመ፡ ጠፍአ፡ በብዙኅ፡ ዕለት፡ እምቤተ፡ መንግሥት፡ ከመ፡ አስተጋብኦ፡ በጥሊሞስ፡ ለመጽሐፈ፡ ነቢያት።
msItem.incipit:
በ፸፻፪፸ወ፰፡ በ፸፻፪፻፸ወ፰፡
ዓመት፡ እምፍጥረተ፡ ዓለም፡ እስከ፡ ይእዜ፡ ሠረቀ፡ መስከረም፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ ማርቆስ፡ በዕለተ፡ ዓርብ፡ እንዘ፡ አበቅቴ፡ ፳ወ፱፡ ወመጥቅዕ፡ ፩፤ ወቦ፡ ዘይቤሉ፡ አልቦ፡ መጥቅዕ፡ ወአልቦ፡ አበቅቴ። ወኮነ፡ ጽሕፈቱ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ በማኅደረ፡ ማርያም፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡ ክቡር፡ ወልዑል፡ ጠቢብ፡ ወማእምር፡ ዘአኅበረ፡ ኵሎ፡ ውርዛዌ፡ ምስለ፡ ቃለ፡ ምሥጢር፤ ወበፅሐ፡ ስሙ፡ እምጽንፈ፡ ምድር፡ እስከ፡ ጽንፈ፡ ምድር፡ ወእምባሕር፡ እስከ፡ ባሕር። ሀልዎቱኒ፡ ኮነ፡ በተሰዶ፤ ምክንያተ፡ ተሰዶቱ፡ እንዘ፡ ኢይትአመር፤ ምንተኒ፡ ነገረ፡ ዓመፃ፡ እንዘ፡ ኢይገብር፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን።

msItem.title: List of the Ethiopian kings of the first period
List of the Ethiopian kings of the second period
List of the Ethiopian kings of the third period
Chronological summary of the preceding periods
List of the kings of the Zāgʷe dynasty
List of the descendants of Dǝlnāʿod
List of the successors of Yǝkunno ʾAmlāk until Dǝmeṭros
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Subscription following the end of the introduction and king lists, preceding the Śǝrʿāta mangǝśt.
Śǝrʿāta mangǝśt (general record)
msItem.incipit: ንጽሕፍ፡ ሕገ፡ ወሥርዓተ፡ መንግሥት፡ ዘወፅአ፡ እምኢየሩሳሌም፡

msItem.title: List of the Ethiopian kings and their genealogy since Adam
msItem.incipit: ንጽሕፍ፡ ዜና፡ ልደቶሙ፡ ለነገሥት፡ እምአዳም፡ እስከ፡ ይእዜ።

msItem.title: ንጽሕፍ፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ኀይለ፡ ወመንክረ፡ ወመዊአ፡ ግሩመ፡ ዘገብረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በእደዊሁ፡ ለዓምደ፡ ጽዮን፡ ንጉሠ፡ ኢትዮጵየ፤ ወስመ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ገብረ፡ መስቀል፤ በ፲ወ፰፡ ዓመተ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ እምዘነግሠ፡ ወዓመተ፡ ምሕረትሂ፡ ፭፻፲ወ፯። ንጽሕፍኬ፡ ዘንተ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ እንዘ፡ ንትአመን፡ አበ፡ ረዳኤ፡
msItem.note: Annals of ʿAmda Ṣǝyon I in the 18th year of his reign, Year of Grace 517.
msItem.incipit: ወሰሚዖ፡ ዓምደ፡ ጽዮን፡ ንጉሠ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ ከመ፡ ዐለዎ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ዕልዋን፡ ዕቡይ፡ ወመምዕላይ፤ ዘአዕበየ፡ ርእሶ፡ ከመ፡ ዲያብሎስ፡ ዘተመክሐ፡ ላእለ፡ ፈጣሪሁ፡ ወይቤ፡ እከውን፡ ከመ፡ ልዑል፤ ወከማሁ፡ አዕበየ፡ ርእሶ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ዕልዋን፡ ዘስሙ፡ ሰብረዲን፡ ወተመክሐ፡ ላእለ፡ እግዚኡ፡ ዓምደ፡ ጽዮን።

msItem.title: Note on the successors of ʿAmda Ṣǝyon I
Annals of the reign of Zarʾa Yāʿqob written under the reign of Lǝbna Dǝngǝl.
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እዌጥን፡ አንሰ፡ ከመ፡ እንብብ፡ ወእከርትስ፡ ኵሎ፡ ሥርዓታቲሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመሢሕነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ዘተሰምየ፡ ቈስጠንጢኖስ፤ ወልደ፡ ማርያም፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ይረስዮ፡ ጽድቆ፡ ወመንግሥቶ፡ ከመ፡ ይትዋረስ፡ በከመ፡ ሕሊናሁ፡ ይፈቅድ፡ ወየኀሥሥ፡ ወይሡጥ፡ ካዕበተ፡ ጸጋሁ፡ ላእለ፡ ወልዱ፡ ልብነ፡ ድንግል፡ ሐዲስ፡

msItem.title: Annals of the reign of Baʾǝda Māryām I
msItem.incipit: ወእምድኅረ፡ አዕረፈ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ነግሠ፡ ወልዱ፡ በእደ፡ ማርያም፡ ህየንተ፡ አቡሁ፡

colophon.note: The colophon states that these annals were written under the reign of Lǝbna Dǝngǝl

msItem.title: Annals of the reign of ʾƎskǝndǝr
msItem.incipit: ወእምድኅሬሁ፡ ነግሠ፡ ወልዱ፡ እስክንድር፡ በከመ፡ አዘዘ፡ እምቅድመ፡ ይዕርፍ፡ እንዘ፡ ይብል፡ ያንግሥዎ፡ እምድኅሬየ፡ ለእስክንድር፡ ወልድየ፡ እስመ፡ ኪያሁ፡ ሠምረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡
msItem.note: There is an invocation for Lǝbna Dǝngǝl at the end of this work.

msItem.title: Annals of the reign of Nāʿod
msItem.incipit: ወእምዝ፡ ነግሠ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ናዖድ፡ ወልደ፡ በእደ፡ ማርያም፡ እኁሁ፡ ለእስክንድር፡

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Śǝrʿāta mangǝśt (same as LIT2335serata)

bibl.title: The Sǝrʿatä Gǝbr: A Mirror View of Daily Life at the Ethiopian Royal Court in the Middle Ages
Northeast African Studies

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ገጽ፡ ዝን፡ ይስሐቄ፡ ገጽ።
በአርያም፡ ይመስል፡ አንቀጽ።
እሳት፡ ይመስል፡ ብቁጽ።
ከመ፡ መዳልው፡ ልጽሉጽ።
ገጹ፡ እንዲያሰደ፡ ግፅ።
እስራኤላዊ፡ መደንግፅ።
ዓይነ፡ ቀራንብቱን፡ ቢገልጽ።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ዣን፡ ይስሐቄ፡ ትኩር።
ትኩረቱም፡ ተምክር።
የዣን፡ ይስሐቄ፡ ነገር።
በሐብል፡ በቃለ፡ ጐዢም፡ ይንግር።
አፍሶ፡ አይፈጃ፡ አፈር።
መትሮ፡ አይፈጃ፡ ግራር።
እስኩ፡ ይንግር።
የእሳታዊ፡ ዱር።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ኢያማዣን፡ ይስሐቄ፡ ኢያማ።
እኹንም፡ ወዴትማ።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
አንተ፡ ልጅ፡ የብስማር።
ለምንጸለህ፡ የኛን፡ ፍቅር።
ምሽት፡ ሰጥተነህ፡ ወይዘር።
አከል፡ ስጥተነሀ፡ ሐመር።
ሶፊ፡ ስጥተነህ፡ ሀገር።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ዣን፡ በደል፡ በድል፡ እሳት።
ጽርሐ፡ ንግሥት፡ ታቦት።
እንደተከስዋች፡ በእሳት።
አስሐረርዋቾ፡ እርሱም፡ በእሳት።
አንበሳ፡ ዳዊት፡ ሐሰ፡ ተሽንጉርት።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ዣን፡ በድል፡ እማም።
አበት፡ የበእደ፡ ማርያም።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ዣን፡ በድል፡ ዘለቅ።
አቤታቾ፡ የአደል፡ መብረቅ።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ሐርበኛ፡ ዓምደ፡ ጽዮን።
መላላስ፡ የወሰን።
ውሀ፡ እንደ፡ መስን፡ መለለሽ፡ የወሰን።
ከወጅ፡ ዜብዳርን፡ ከገንዝ፡ ጠጠን።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ዓምደ፡ ጽዮን፡ ስም፡ የዘራ
በወጅ፡ እስከ፡ በጥርአምራ።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ዣን፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ በድል፡ ፀሐይ።
አንዣት፡ የዚከብራይ።
ባልዋ፡ የባርዜላይ።
ዣን፡ በደበና፡ ቢታይ።
በአልቱት፡ ያዘለችው፡ ይመስል፡ ስርናይ።
ዣን፡ በደበና፡ ቢታይ።
አበባ፡ ይመስል፡ ገለገይ።
የመስከረም፡ ይመስል፡ ጽገይ።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ገመር፡ አጽናፈ፡ ምድር።
ለከ፡ ወጽኸልን፡ ወገር።
ግራኝ፡ በኢትዮጵያ፡ ነግሥ፡ ነበር።
ንዋየ፡ ቅድሳት፡ ሲማነዝር።
በማመድ፡ ሲየዘምር።

msItem.title: Royal songs
msItem.incipit:
ቤት፡ አንሣ።
ደረባ፡ ሙአይ፡ ወደቢ።
ግራ፡ ሰው፡ ወንዶች፡ ፩፡ ማዋ።

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Lǝbna Dǝngǝl (same as LIT4651ChronLeb)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record)
msItem.incipit: ወእምድኅረዝ፡ ነግሠ፡ ወልዱ፡ ገላውዴዎስ፡ ወስመ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ አጽናፍ፡ ሰገድ፡ አንዘ፡ ሕፃን፡ ውእቱ፡

msItem.title: Annals of the reign of Galāwdewos
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ሥሉስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ንወጥን፡ በዝየ፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ዜና፡ ሠናይ፡ ዘጥዑም፡ ውስተ፡ አፍ፡ ወውስተ፡ ጕርዔ፡ አምጣዕመ፡ መዓር፡ ማር፡ ገላውዴዎስ፡ ዘነግሠ፡ በኢትዮጵያ፡ ዓባይ፡ እምጽንፋ፡ እስከ፡ ጽንፋ፡
msItem.colophon: ተፈጸመ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ በዓመት፡ በ፸፻ወ፫፻ወ፪፡ ዓመት፡ እምዓመተ፡ እስክንድር፡ ዘ፪፡ አቅርንቲሁ፡ ወበ፲፻ወ፭፻፡ እምልደተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ ወበ፲፻ወ፪፻፵፡ እምዓመተ፡ ሰማዕታት፡ ወበ፱፻፶ወ፮፡ እምአመ፡ ተንባላት፡ ዓመተ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ለንጉሥ፡ አጽናፍ፡ ሰገድ፡ በጸጋ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ዘተሰምየ፡ ገላውዴዎስ፡ ወበ፪፡ ዓመት፡ እመንግሥተ፡ እኁሁ፡ አድማስ፡ ሰገድ፡ በጸጋ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ዘተሰምየ፡ ሚናስ፡ ወኮነ፡ ጥንቱ፡ ወተፍጻሜቱ፡ ወርኀ፡ ኅዳር፡ ሣልስ፡ ወርኆሙ፡ ለሮም፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ጀማድ፡ እልአኾር፡ ሳድሳይ፡ ወርኆሙ፡ ለተንባላት፡ ወተፈጸመ፡ አመ፡ ፭፡ እምኔሁ፡ ዘውእቱ፡ አመ፡ ፳፡ ወ፫፡ በወርኀ፡ መጋቢት፡ በዕለተ፡ ረቡዕ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ፀሐይ፡ በ፳ወ፫፡ መዓርግ፡ እመዓርጋት፡ ዓቢያት፡ በማኅፈደ፡ ሐመል፡ ስብሐት፡ ወዘአጽሐፎ፡ ሰ፡ ደጅ፡ አዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡ ወልዱ፡ ለደጃዝማች፡ እሼቴ፡ ወእሙሂ፡ ወይዘሮ፡ ወለተ፡ ሩፋኤል፡ ወለተ፡ አድያም፡ ሰገድ፡ ኢያሱ፡ መንገለ፡ አቡሃ፡ ወመንገለ፡ እማ፡ አልቦ፡ ዘይትኤረይ። Die äthiopischen Königschroniken in der Sammlung des Däǧǧazmač Ḫaylu: Entstehung und handschriftliche Überlieferung des WerksHeidelberger orientalische StudienManfredKroppFrankfurt a. M.Lang1989Heidelberger orientalische Studien131328

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Minās (same as LIT4330Minas)
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እዌጥን፡ አንሰ፡ ከመ፡ እንብብ፡ ወእከርትስ፡ ዜናሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ማር፡ ሚናስ፡

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl (same as LIT3531Sarsa)
msItem.incipit: ንጽሕፍ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ዜናሁ፡ ለንጉሥ፡ ሠርፀ፡ ድንግል፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ያንኅ፡ መዋዕሊሁ፡ ከመ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ዕፀ፡ ሐይወት፡

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Seventh Book
msItem.note: The seventh book ends with a note stating that the work originally ended with this book.

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Eighth Book
msItem.incipit: ሳምን፡ አንቀጽ፡ ሀሎ፡ ውስቴቱ፡ ዜና፡ መዊዕ፡ ግሩም፡ ወመደንግፅ፡ ዘያዴሞሞ፡ ሕሊና፡ እምሐልዮቱ፡ ወያደነግፅ፡ እዝነ፡ ሰማዒ፡ ዮሴፍ፡ ወልደ፡ ኮርዮን፡ አመ፡ ጸሐፈ፡ ዜና፡ መዊኦቶሙ፡ ለአይሁድ፡ ኀተመ፡ መጽሐፎ፡ በዝንቱ፡ ኍልቍ፡ ዘውእቱ፡ አንቀጽ፡ ፰። ንሕነኒ፡ ተለውነ፡ አሠረ፡ ዚአሁ፡ ወረሰይነ፡ ማኅተመ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ በአንቀጽ፡ ሳምናይ፤ ወባሕቱ፡ ኢነምር፡ እመ፡ ይዌስክ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ መዊአ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ንጉሥ፡ መዊአ፡ ወእመ፡ ይትዌስክ፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ዜና፡ ውስቱ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ኍልቍ፡

colophon.note: The colophon states that the book was finished in the year 7073 of the world, 1898 Era of Alexander, 1573 of Christ, 1293 of the martyrs, in the 18th year of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl's reign.

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Ninth Book
msItem.note: This book contains the story of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl from the 18th year of his reign to his death.

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Abridged Chronicles of the successors of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Reign of ʾaṣe Yāʿqob
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Reign of Zadǝngǝl
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Restoration of ʾaṣe Yāʿqob
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): A short summary of the Chronicle of Susǝnyos
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Fāsiladas (same as LIT4640Chronicle)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Yoḥannǝs I (same as LIT3947ChronYohannes)
msItem.incipit: ወነግሠ፡ ወልዱ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወተሰምየ፡ ስመ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ አእላፍ፡ ሰገድ።

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Different abridged version of the chronicle of Yoḥannǝs I
msItem.incipit: ታሪክ፡ ዘአጽናፍ፡ ዘአእላፍ፡ ሰገድ፡ ዳግም፡ ዘረከብነ፡ በካልእ፡ ብሔር።

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of ʾIyāsu I (same as LIT3950ChronIyasu)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Takla Hāymānot I Short Chronicle, forma volgata BNFet142 BassÉth (same as LIT4638Chronicle)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Tewoflos Short Chronicle, forma volgata BNFet142 BassÉth (same as LIT4636Chronicle)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Yosṭos Short Chronicle, forma volgata BNFet142 BassÉth (same as LIT4637Chronicle)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Dāwit III Short Chronicle, forma volgata BNFet142 BassÉth (same as LIT4639Chronicle)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Bäkaffa (same as LIT4633Chronicle)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of ʾIyāsu II (same as LIT4634Chronicle)
Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of ʾIyoʾas I (same as LIT4635Chronicle)
Second Chapter
msItem.incipit: አንቀጽ፡ ፪። በ፸፻ወ፪፻፵ወ፰፡ ዓመት፡ እምአመ፡ ተፈጥረ፡ ዓለም፡ በዘመነ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ ሠረቀ፡ መስከረም፡ በዕለተ፡ ረቡዕ፡ በ፩፡ ዓመተ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ዘኮነ፡ ናሁ፡ ጸሐፍነ፡ ታሪከ፡ ዜናሆሙ፡ ለንጉሥነ፡ ኢዮኣስ፡ ወንግሥት፡ ምንትዋብ፡ በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡

msItem.title: ንጽሕፍ፡ ዜና፡ ነገሩ፡ ወታሪከ፡ ልደቱ፡ ለክቡር፡ ራስ፡ ሚካኤል
msItem.note: Second chapter about rās , containing mainly his genealogy.

msItem.title: Fourteenth Chapter
msItem.note: The following rubric is in the middle of the chapter: ንጽሕፍ፡ ዜናሁ፡ ለራስ፡ ሚካኤል፡

msItem.title:
History of
rās continued under the reigns of Yoḥannǝs II, Takla Hāymānot II and Takla Giyorgis I
msItem.incipit: እዌጥን፡ እምጥንቱ፡ ለግብር፡ ወእነግር፡ ግብሮ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘገብረ፡ በእደ፡ መልአኩ፡ ርእሰ፡ ኀያላን፡ ሚካኤል፡ ኀያል፡ ወመስተዓግሥ፡ ዘይኴንን፡ እምባሕር፡ እስከ፡ ባሕር፡ እምነ፡ ሞጽዋ፡ እስከ፡ አድዋ፡ ወእምአድዋ፡ እስከ፡ ዘዋ፡
msItem.colophon:
ወአጽሐፎን፡ ለእለ፡ መጻሕፍት፡ ታሪክ፡ ዘነገሥታት፡ ወመኳንንት፡ እለ፡ ኮኑ፡ እምፍጥረተ፡ አዳም፡ እስከ፡
ንጉሥ፡ አድማስ፡ ሰገድ፡ ተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ወአስተጋብኦን፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡ እንዘ፡ ሕፃን፡ ልሒቅ፡ በአስተሐምሞ፡ ወፃሕቅ፡ እምኵሎን፡ አድባራት፡ ወእምደሰያት፡ ወእምቤተ፡ አዛዦች፡ ወእምቤተ፡ ጸሐፍተ፡ ትእዛዝ፤ ወእምዝ፡ ኵሉ፡ አስተጋብኦን፡ ለእለ፡ መጻሕፍተ፡ ታሪክ፡ እምአመ፡ ጠፍአ፡ በብዙኅ፡ ዘመን፤ በከመ፡ አስተጋብኦን፡ ዕዝራ፡ ነቢየ፡ ትካ ት፡ ለኵሎን፡ መጻሕፍተ፡ ነቢያት፡ እለ፡ ውዕያ፡ ቀዳሚ፡ በእሳት፡ ከማሁ፡ አስተጋብኦን፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡ ርእሰ፡ መኳንንት፡ ለኵሎን፡ መጻሕፍተ፡ ነገሥት፡ እለ፡ ጠፍአ፡ አመ፡ ውዕየ፡ ቤተ፡ መንግሥት፡ በመዓቱ፡ ለራስ፡ ሚካኤል፡ ክቡደ፡ መአት፤ ወበከመ፡ አስተጋብእዎን፡ ፫፻፲ወ፰፡ ለመጻሕፍተ፡ ሐዲሳት፡ ከማሁ፡ አስተጋብኦን። ባሕቱ፡ ኢሀሎ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ወመኰንን፡ በአስተሐምሞ፡ ወጻሕቅ፡ ዘይሰምዖን፡ ወዘይሬእዮን። ተፈጸመ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ታሪክ፡ አመ፡ ፮፡ ለ ወርኀ፡ መስከረም፡ ቡሩክ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን።
msItem.note: This manuscript contains an abbreviated recension of this account, see Die äthiopischen Königschroniken in der Sammlung des Däǧǧazmač Ḫaylu: Entstehung und handschriftliche Überlieferung des WerksHeidelberger orientalische StudienManfredKroppFrankfurt a. M.Lang1989Heidelberger orientalische Studien131349–50.

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Chronicle of Takla Giyorgis I, with an intermission for the reign of Salomon I
msItem.incipit:
በስመ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዜና፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ክቡር፡ ለመሲሕ፡ ዘአዕይንቲሁ፡ ከመ፡ ኮከበ፡ ጽባሕ፤ ወገጹ፡ ፍትው፡ ወብሩህ፤ ወቆሙ፡ ከመ፡ ቆመ፡ መልአክ፡ ነዊህ፤ ወውርዛዊሁ፡ ከመ፡ ውርዛዊ፡ ሶምሶን፡ መፍርህ፡
ዝውእቱ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ነገሥት፡ ተክለ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ዘስመ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ፍቅር፡ ሰገድ። አንሰ፡ እሔሊ፡ በልብየ፡ ከመ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ውእቱ፡ ቴዎድሮስ፡ ዘተብህለ፡ ይምጽእ፡ እምሥራቅ፡ በድኅር፡ ምሥራቅሂ፡ ወላዲቱ፡ ሠናይተ፡ ምግባር፡ ዘአሥረቀት፡ ኪያሁ፡ ፀሐይ፡ ጽድቅ፡ ወፍቅር፡ እመሰ፡ ጸሐፍነ፡ ኵሎ፡ መከራሁ፡

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): Biography of Ḫāyla Mikāʾel ʾƎšate
msItem.incipit:
በስመ፡
ናሁ፡ ንዌጥን፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ዜናሁ፡ ዕፁብ፡ ወመንክር፡ ለለባዊ፡ ወማእምር፡ ወዜና፡ ልደቱ፡ ዘይጥዕም፡ እመዓር፡ ወሥካር፡ እምአበው፡ ክቡራን፡ ዘኢይትኤረዮሙ፡ ዓለም፡ በክብር፡ ወዜና፡ ልሕቀቱ፡ በተግሣጽ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ፍቁር፡ ወክቡር፡ ኀይለ፡ ሚካኤል፡ ብሩሃ፡ ገጽ፡
msItem.colophon: በ፸፻ወ፪፻፸ወ፰፡ እምፍጥረተ፡ ዓለም፡ ሠረቀ፡ መስከረም፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ ማርቆስ፡ አመ፡ ፯፡ ለዝወርኅ፡ ተፈጸመ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ታሪክ፡ እመ፡ አመ፡ ተወጥነ፡ አመ፡ ፮፤ ለነሐሴ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡ በማኅደረ፡ ማርያም፡ ሀልዎቱኒ፡ በተሰደ፡ ምክንያቱ፡ እንዘ፡ ኢይትአመር፡ ምንተኒ፡ ነገረ፡ ዓመፃ፡ እንዘ፡ ኢይገብር፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን።

ወአመ፡ ፩፡ ለመስከረም፡ ወዕለቱ፡ ዓርብ፡ ርእሰ፡ ዓውደ፡ ዓመት፡ ወረደ፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ውስተ፡ ፈለግ፡ ዘይሰመይ፡ መተራይ፡ ከመ፡ ይትኀፀብ፡ በዘዮርዳኖስ፡ ቀላይ፡ ዘአምጽአ፡ ሎቱ፡ አባ፡ ወልደ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ነዳይ፡ እምአመ፡ ምጽአቱ፡ ለጳጳስነ፡ ዮሳብ፡ ኅሩይ፡ ወዘአንበራ፡ እስከ፡ ዘዮም፡ ዕለት፡ በማኅደረ፡ ማርያም፡ ዓባይ፡ ሕንጸሃ፡ አልቦ፡ ዘይትዓረይ፡ መተሐፅበ፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡ በከመ። ተሐፅበ፡ ኢዮብ፡ ወጥዕየ፡ እምደዌሁ። ወአነኒ፡ ተሐፀብኩ፡ ወለዝ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ታሪክ፡ ዘአልቦ፡ ሐሰት፡ ጸሐፍክዎ፡ አነ፡ አበጋዝ፡ ዘብሔርየ፡ ብሔረ፡ ሸዋ፡ ወእግዚአብሔር፡ የአምር፡ ከመ፡ ኢወሰኩ፡ አላ፡ ነበብኩ፡ ኅዳጠ፡ እምዘሰማዕኩ፡ ወእስከዝየ፡ አብጻሕኩ፡ ወእምዝ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ በማኅደረ፡ ማርያም፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡
msItem.note: Identified by Hermann Zotenberg as the biography of Mikāʾel Sǝḥul, but see La storia di Ḫāyla MikāʾēlAtti della Reale Accademia dei Lincei, Rendiconti, Classe di scienze morale, storiche e filologicheIgnazioGuidi1902Serie quinta, 112-79http://menadoc.bibliothek.uni-halle.de/ssg/content/titleinfo/9193983.

bibl.title: La storia di Ḫāyla Mikāʾēl
Atti della Reale Accademia dei Lincei, Rendiconti, Classe di scienze morale, storiche e filologiche

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): History of ʾAli Gwāngul, ʾAli I and of the restoration of Takla Giyorgis I
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ናሁ፡ ንዌጥን፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ዜናሁ፡ አዳም፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ታሪኩ፡ ለሐዲስ፡ ቈስጠንጢኖስ፡ ራስ፡ አሊ፡ ርእሰ፡ መኳንንት፡

msItem.title: ታሪክ፡ ዘራስ፡ አሊጋዝ፡
msItem.incipit: ወእምዝ፡ ተሠይመ፡ ራስ፡ አሊጋዝ፡ እኁሁ፡ ለራስ፡ አሊ፡ ወሰፈነ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዓለመ፡ ህየንቲሁ፡ እስመ፡ ኮነ፡ ተሠይሞቱ፡ በፈቃደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡
msItem.note: History of Aligaz and of the reign of until 7301

msItem.title: Ḫāylu Compilation (general record): EndowmentMakanaIyasus
msItem.note: Abbreviated version of the record, see Die äthiopischen Königschroniken in der Sammlung des Däǧǧazmač Ḫaylu: Entstehung und handschriftliche Überlieferung des WerksHeidelberger orientalische StudienManfredKroppFrankfurt a. M.Lang1989Heidelberger orientalische Studien131381.

item.desc: Many spaces for rubricated names have been left unfilled.

origDate.note: Date according to Die Geschichte des Lebna-Dengel, Claudius und MināsCorpus Scriptorum Christianorum OrientaliumManfredKroppLovaniiPeeters1988Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium503 Scriptores Aethiopici, 83I503 Scriptores Aethiopici, 83XIV.

bibl.title: Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens (gheez et amharique) de la Bibliothèque nationale
Manuscrits Orientaux
Zekra Nagar. Die universalhistorische Einleitung nach Giyorgis Walda-Amid in der Chronikensammlung des Haylu

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:div.t:ab: መሊስ፡ ፬፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ አዝጓጕ፡ ፸ወ፮፡ ዓ፡ እለሕርካ፡ ዘሐቅሊ፡ ፲፫፡ ዓ፡ ዘድማኅ፡ ፲፡ ዓ፡ ዘአውጥጥ፡ ፪፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ ዓውዳ፡ ፴፡ ዓ፡ ብዝግ፡ ወዝማፊ፡ ፰፡ ዓ፡ ዘገፈሊ፡ ፩፡ ዓ፡ ዘብእሴ፡ ሠርቅ፡ ፬፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ አዝጓጕ፡ ፸፡ ወ፮፡ ዓ፡ እለ፡ ሕርካ፡ ፳ወ፩፡ ዓ፡ ዘብእሴ፡ ፄዋዛ፡ ፩፡ ዓ፡ ዘወኸና፡ ፪፡ ዓ፡ ዘሐዳውስ፡ ፬፡ ወርኅ፡ ዘእለሰገል፡ ፫፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለአስፍሕ፡ ፲፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ ጽጋብ፡ ፳ወ፫፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ ሠመሬ፡ ፫፡ ዓመት፡ ዘእለ፡ አንሴ፡ ፲ጠ፯፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለአስገዴ፡ ፴ወ፮፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ ፃሕም፡ ፱፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ ሳን፡ ፲ወ ፫፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ አይጋ፡ ፲ወ፰፡ ዓ፡ ዘአልአሜዳ፡ ፴፡ ዓ፡ ወ፰፡ ወርኅ፡ ዘእለአሕየዋ፡ ፫፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ አብርሃ፡ ወአጽብሐ፡ መራህያነ፡ ብርሃን፡ ዘስሞሙ፡ እጓለ፡ አንበሳ፡ ፳ወ፮፡ ዓ፡ ወ፮፡ አውራኅ፡ ወአመ፡ ፫፡ ዓመተ፡ መንግሥቶሙ፡ ለእሉ፡ ፬፻ወ፳ወ፭፡ ዓ። ዘእንበለ፡ አብርሃ፡ ፲ወ፪፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ አስፍሕ፡ ፯፡ ዓ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ዘእለ፡ ሣህል፡ ፲ወ፬፡ ዓ፡ ዘእለ፡ አድኀና፡ ፲ወ፬፡ ዓመ፡

ዝንቱ፡ ታሪክ፡ ዘተጽሕፈ፡ በ፸፻ወ፪፻፸ወ፯፡ ዓመተ፡ ዓለም፤ ወእምኔሁ፡ በ፲፻ወ፯፻፸ወ፯፡ ዓመተ፡ ምሕረት፡ በዘመነ፡ ማቴዎስ፤ ሠረቀ፡ መስከረም፡ በዕለተ፡ ሐሙስ፡ እንዘ፡ አበቅቴ፡ ፲ወ፰፡ ወመጥቅዕ፡ ፲ወ፪፡ ወጥንትዮን፡ ፪፤ እምአመ፡ ነግሠ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ነገሥት፡ ኢየሱ፡ በ፮፡ አውራኅ፤ ዘአጽሐፎ፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኀይሉ፡ ወልዱ፡ ለደጅ፡ አዝማች፡ እሸቴ፤
እጽሕፍ፡ ታሪከ፡ ዜና፡ ኀይሎሙ፡ ለንጉሥ፡ ኢያሱ፡ ወምንትዋብ፡ ንግሥት፡ ዘገብረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በዘመኖሙ፡
